title: Havershaw's Survival Modpack
description: This lighter modpack aims to add various building blocks, structures, and QoL features.
body:
Havershaw's Survival Modpack focuses on 3 main aspects of Minecraft to expand upon: Building, Exploring, and Quality of Life.

For **Building**, the main items are Macaw's item mods that add in things like bridges, fences, doors, etc. and the Stonework mod that adds many block variants of already existing blocks. Oh, and vertical slabs.

For **Exploring**, we added Dungeons and Taverns and all its expansions to overhaul a lot of the base structures and add additional structures to explore. Don't forget about Terralith and Tectonic for overhauled world generation. The Waystones mod also allows for easier transport from place to place.

For **Quality of Life**, we added the usual performance enhancing mods such as Sodium and Lithium. Tom's Simple Storage Mod and Storage Drawers for any storage needs. There is also Easy Magic, Elytra Chestplate, and Tool Trims, among others.

Other mods will be added as seems fit.
